Short CV

Born in 1993 in Bartın, Ridvan DOGAN graduated from Karabuk University, Department of Nursing in 2016. Then, he completed his master's degree at Karabuk University, Department of Nursing (Psychiatry). He is still continuing his doctorate education at Marmara University Nursing (Public Health) Department.
